item.title: International Postgraduate Diploma "Prospectiva estratégica del nuevo escenario global" - The Millennium Project
item.description: The Chile Node of The Millennium Project, represented by Professor Héctor Casanueva, in collaboration with the The Millennium Project, the Ibero-American Foresight Network (RIBER), and other prestigious international organizations, has announced the opening of applications for its upcoming Postgraduate Diploma: “Prospectiva estratégica del nuevo escenario global: Chile, EE.UU, UE, Asia, China, América Latina, OO.II., mundo.” […]

item.title: FEN Exchange on Futures Gaming - July 9, 2026 - The Millennium Project
item.description: The next FEN Exchange on “Futures Gaming: Futures, Games, Fun and Immersion” will be hosted by Oliver Lauenstein. He did an extensive deep dive into the vastness of games and will share his thoughts as well as an immersive experience. Games can bring fun, interaction and immersion to the table in a way we are […]

item.title: Delphi Survey on the Future of Business organizations and the social economy in 2040 - The Millennium Project
item.description: The Millennium Project Spain, Node, led by Deputy Director Ibon Zugasti, and ASETT invite experts to contribute to a Delphi survey on the Future of Business organizations and the social economy in 2040. The main objective of the study is to identify the key factors affecting the future of business organisations in general and those […]

item.title: Our World of Futures Studies as a Mosaic II is out - The Millennium Project
item.description: The eleventh volume f the prestigious Futures Series, published by the Finnish Society for Futures Studies, is officially out. Titled “Our World of Futures Studies as a Mosaic 2 (Futures Series 11)“ and edited by Tero Villman, Sirkka Heinonen, and Hazel Salminen, this volume continues the evocative mosaic metaphor introduced in 2024 and was officially […]

item.title: The Millennium Project Launches New Australia-New Zealand (ANZ) Node - The Millennium Project
item.description: The Millennium Project is officially expanding its global footprint with the launch of the new Australia-New Zealand (ANZ) Node, hosted by Design Futures Aotearoa (DFA). This newly established shared ANZ node is set to connect futures practitioners, researchers, policymakers, educators, and civic leaders across both nations, building upon a long regional tradition of futures thinking […]

item.title: Mini Trip Report Tokyo - May 16-18, 2026 - The Millennium Project
item.description: By Jerome Glenn Hayato Kobayashi and I brough together an excellent group of 14 government, university, NGO, and business futurists to re-create the Japan Node (three came after or before the photo was taken; hence, only 11 in the photo below). Ryuta Minami is a journalist for the on-line Newsweek and Yahoo News Japan and […]

item.title: Jerome Glenn Briefs UN Leaders and Tech Pioneers in China - The Millennium Project
item.description: Jerome C. Glenn, Executive Director of The Millennium Project, has completed a visit to Shanghai and Hangzhou focused on addressing issues of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) and meeting with frontier technology organizations. The visit was organized and sponsored by the Council of Presidents of the United Nations General Assembly and the Zhejiang University International Business […]

item.title: Expertise needed for the Twin Transition and the future of work project - The Millennium Project
item.description: 4CF The Futures Literacy Company, hosting the Poland Node of The Millennium Project, invites you to participate in an upcoming international research project focused on the “ Twin Transition” and the future of work .

item.title: Futures Glossary Project – FEN Exchange, May 7, 2026 - The Millennium Project
item.description: After a vibrant discussion on the health of our European democracy, the next FEN Exchange on the Futures Glossary project is just around the corner on 7th of May, 15:00 – 16:00 CEST. Many crucial terms are used by futurists. Do we have a shared understanding of them in English? Do we use the most […]

item.title: Virtual OECD Government Foresight Community (GFC) Day - April 14, 2026 - The Millennium Project
item.description: On 14 April 2026, the Virtual OECD Government Foresight Community (GFC) Day will take place online, bringing together foresight practitioners, policymakers, and innovators from 23 countries. The preliminary agenda features 56 presentations spanning the entire day, reflecting the breadth and diversity of the global foresight community. The event, organised by the OECD, will focus on […]

item.title: Another ( ) is Possible: A Glossary for Other Worlds
item.description: Glossary of foresight terms
